Sikkim Polytechnic Entrance Examination.official_note: Official Sikkim Govt (HRDD) technical-education page covering the state polytechnics (ATTC, CCCT). Polytechnic diploma admission is run by the Directorate of Technical Education, HRDD; merit lists are posted on the HRDD notice board / EMMIS portal (education.sikkim.gov.in, emmishe.sikkim.gov.in), which are ASP.NET/PDF-gated. No static cutoff table is published. Prior current_official_cutoff_url was a generic HRDD department homepage.

Sir Jamsetjee Jeejebhoy School of Art En.official_note: BFA admission to Sir JJ School of Art is through MAH-AAC-CET conducted by the Maharashtra State CET Cell. cetcell.mahacet.org is the official CET-cell body (confirmed via search; returns HTTP 403 to automated fetch but is live). The year-specific CAP merit list / category cutoffs are published on the admission portal e.g. fineart2025.mahacet.org/FINEART2025/login. No openly accessible static cutoff table.

St Xavier's College Entrance Examination.official_note: Official St Xavier's College Mumbai Entrance Test (XET) portal where UG merit lists/results are published. Selection = 60% XET + 40% Class 12. Page loads as a JS app (no static table). already_has_data is true, so extraction skipped.

Tamil Nadu Bachelor of Business Administ.official_note: Official Tamil Nadu Govt Arts & Science Colleges Admission (TNGASA) online counselling portal. BBA admission uses the TNGASA general rank list based on Class 12 marks; college-wise rank/merit lists are published here as PDFs behind the portal, with no static cutoff table accessible. Prior current_official_cutoff_url was a Shiksha third-party page.

Tamil Nadu Dr Ambedkar Law University En.official_note: Official TNDALU page titled 'LAW ADMISSION CUT-OFF MARKS' listing ~12 downloadable cutoff PDFs by program/round/category (5-Year B.A.LL.B affiliated colleges, 3-Year LL.B, SOEL 5-Year Honours, 7.5% special reservation, 2-Year LL.M, etc.). Admission is merit-based on qualifying-exam marks, not an entrance test. already_has_data is true, so per-PDF row extraction skipped.

Tata Institute of Social Sciences Bachel.official_note: Official TISS admissions portal (also reachable at admissions.tiss.ac.in). UG/Bachelor admission is now via CUET-UG; TISS publishes campus/course-wise merit lists rather than separate cutoff scores. WebFetch hit a TLS certificate error (environmental), so could not render content. already_has_data is true.

Official TISS School of Vocational Education programme page for the Bachelor in Agriculture (B.Voc). Admission details are via the Admission Brochure/Timeline (sve.tiss.edu/admission); no static cutoff or merit table is published on the site.
